member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService
member.summary: Interface for FireCrawl MCP web scraping operations. Enables autonomous web scraping, branding extraction, site mapping, and structured data extraction.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.ScrapeAsync(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Scrape a single webpage - pulls content + metadata. Converts HTML to clean markdown suitable for LLM ingestion.
member.param: Include raw HTML in response (default: false)
member.returns: Scraped content with markdown and metadata

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.MapAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Map website structure - discovers all subpages and internal links. Useful for understanding site architecture before crawling.
member.returns: Site structure with all discovered links

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.CrawlAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlCrawlRequest)
member.summary: Crawl multiple pages - traverses linked pages and collects content. Use after Map to selectively crawl discovered pages.
member.param: Crawl configuration (URL, depth, max pages, etc.)
member.returns: Collection of crawled pages with content

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.ExtractAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlExtractRequest)
member.summary: Extract structured data from webpage using AI. Can extract branding (colors, fonts, logos), product data, contact info, etc.
member.param: Extraction configuration with URL and optional schema

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.ExtractBrandingAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Extract branding data specifically (colors, fonts, typography, logo). Convenience method for common use case of branding audits.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.ScreenshotAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlScreenshotRequest)
member.summary: Capture full-page screenshot of a webpage. Returns base64-encoded PNG image.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IFireCrawlService.SearchAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlSearchRequest)
member.summary: Search within a website or domain for specific content. Uses AI to find relevant pages matching the query.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IWebSearchService
member.summary: Interface for web search operations.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IWebSearchService.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search the web for information. Uses Bing API if configured, otherwise falls back to DuckDuckGo HTML scraping.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Abstractions.IWebSearchService.FetchUrlAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetch and read the content of a web page.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService
member.summary: Service for FireCrawl MCP web scraping operations. Provides web scraping, branding extraction, site mapping, and structured data extraction.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.#ctor(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlConfig,System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Action{System.String},System.Action{System.Exception,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a new FireCrawlService instance.
member.param: Optional HttpClient. If null, creates a new one.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.ScrapeAsync(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Scrape a single webpage - pulls content + metadata.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.MapAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Map website structure - discovers all subpages and internal links.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.CrawlAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlCrawlRequest)
member.summary: Crawl multiple pages - traverses linked pages and collects content.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.ExtractAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlExtractRequest)
member.summary: Extract structured data from webpage using AI.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.ExtractBrandingAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Extract branding data specifically (colors, fonts, typography, logo).

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.ScreenshotAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlScreenshotRequest)
member.summary: Capture full-page screenshot of a webpage.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.FireCrawlService.SearchAsync(Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlSearchRequest)
member.summary: Search within a website or domain for specific content.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlConfig
member.summary: Configuration for FireCrawl service

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlResult
member.summary: Base result class for all FireCrawl operations

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlScrapeResult
member.summary: Result of a scrape operation - fetches webpage content and metadata

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlMapResult
member.summary: Result of a map operation - discovers website structure

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlCrawlRequest
member.summary: Request for crawl operation - traverse multiple pages

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlPageResult
member.summary: Single page result from crawl operation

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlCrawlResult
member.summary: Result of crawl operation - multiple pages crawled

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlExtractRequest
member.summary: Request for extract operation - structured data extraction

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.BrandingData
member.summary: Branding data extracted from website

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlExtractResult
member.summary: Result of extract operation - structured data

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlScreenshotRequest
member.summary: Request for screenshot operation

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlScreenshotResult
member.summary: Result of screenshot operation

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlSearchRequest
member.summary: Request for search operation - query site content

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlSearchResultItem
member.summary: Single search result item

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.FireCrawlSearchResult
member.summary: Result of search operation

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.WebSearchResult
member.summary: Result of a web search operation.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.WebSearchResultItem
member.summary: A single web search result item.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.Models.WebPageContent
member.summary: Content fetched from a web page.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.WebScrapingService
member.summary: Service responsible for web scraping operations including sitemap reading, webpage scraping, and website import functionality. This refactored version avoids direct LLM dependencies and hardcoded API keys.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.WebScrapingService.ImportWholeWebsiteAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Imports a website: tries WordPress API import, falls back to parsing sitemap.xml and scraping top pages. Writes pages to Uploads and updates uploadedFiles.json, splitting long files when needed.

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.WebSearchService
member.summary: Service for performing web searches using DuckDuckGo or Bing. Generic implementation suitable for any .NET application.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.WebSearchService.#ctor(System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.Action{System.String},System.Action{System.Exception,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a new WebSearchService instance.
member.param: Optional Bing Search API key. If null, uses DuckDuckGo fallback.
Optional HttpClient. If null, creates a new one.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.WebSearchService.SearchAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search the web for information. Uses Bing API if key is configured, otherwise falls back to DuckDuckGo HTML scraping.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Services.Web.WebSearchService.FetchUrlAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetch and read the content of a web page.
